category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo).

title.en: China-to-Congo-Brazzaville EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入刚果（布）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入剛果（布）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo — NOT the DRC) ACONOQ / ARSEL / E2C requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, ARSEL grid-connection and project-approval requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. The Republic of the Congo operates on 220/380 V, 50 Hz in an IEC-aligned Francophone regulatory tradition. The EV market is essentially nascent; charging infrastructure is largely absent as of 2026.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与刚果（布）（刚果共和国——非刚果民主共和国）ACONOQ / ARSEL / E2C要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、ARSEL并网及项目审批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。刚果共和国电网为220/380 V、50 Hz，遵循IEC体系的法语区监管传统。截至2026年，该国电动汽车市场基本处于萌芽阶段，充电基础设施几乎缺失。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與剛果（布）（剛果共和國——非剛果民主共和國）ACONOQ / ARSEL / E2C要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、ARSEL併網及項目審批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。剛果共和國電網為220/380 V、50 Hz，遵循IEC體系的法語區監管傳統。截至2026年，該國電動汽車市場基本處於萌芽階段，充電基礎設施幾乎缺失。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo — NOT the DRC), the confirmed practical gaps are IEC-based safety evidence required under IEC 61851, connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 since Congo-Brazzaville follows the IEC/Francophone connector tradition and GB/T connectors are physically incompatible, ARSEL project-level coordination for any grid-connected installation, IP-rated enclosure protection appropriate for equatorial humidity and temperature conditions, and OCPP back-office interoperability for any networked charger deployment. Congo-Brazzaville operates on 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz — identical nominal voltage to China's domestic baseline — but equatorial ambient conditions (sustained high humidity and heat) require thermal and moisture derating confirmation. The EV market in Congo-Brazzaville is essentially non-existent as of 2026; the economy is oil-based and private vehicle charging infrastructure is absent. Regulatory conformity assessment routes for EV chargers through ACONOQ are unconfirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should verify current conformity assessment requirements, ARSEL licensing, E2C grid-connection procedures, and applicable IEC standard editions before shipment or installation.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入刚果（布）（刚果共和国——非刚果民主共和国）时，已确认的实务差距包括：IEC 61851要求的IEC体系安全证据；由于刚果（布）遵循IEC/法语区接口传统，GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，须将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；任何并网安装须经ARSEL项目级协调；需具备适应赤道地区高湿、高温环境的IP防护等级；联网充电桩需满足OCPP后台互操作要求。刚果（布）电网为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与中国国内基线标称电压相同，但赤道环境条件（持续高湿高热）需确认热降额和防潮设计。截至2026年，刚果（布）电动汽车市场基本不存在，该国以石油经济为主，私人车辆充电基础设施几乎缺失。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认通过ACONOQ对电动汽车充电桩的合格评定路径。出口商应在出货或安装前核实当前合格评定要求、ARSEL许可、E2C并网程序及适用IEC标准版本。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入剛果（布）（剛果共和國——非剛果民主共和國）時，已確認的實務差距包括：IEC 61851要求的IEC體系安全證據；由於剛果（布）遵循IEC/法語區接口傳統，GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，須將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；任何併網安裝須經ARSEL項目級協調；需具備適應赤道地區高濕、高溫環境的IP防護等級；聯網充電樁需滿足OCPP後台互操作要求。剛果（布）電網為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與中國國內基線標稱電壓相同，但赤道環境條件（持續高濕高熱）需確認熱降額和防潮設計。截至2026年，剛果（布）電動汽車市場基本不存在，該國以石油經濟為主，私人車輛充電基礎設施幾乎缺失。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認通過ACONOQ對電動汽車充電樁的合格評定路徑。出口商應在出貨或安裝前核實當前合格評定要求、ARSEL許可、E2C併網程序及適用IEC標準版本。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ACONOQ scope determination, ARSEL approval, E2C grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Congo-Brazzaville conformity assessment rules, ARSEL licensing requirements, E2C grid-connection procedures, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Congo-Brazzaville refers to the Republic of the Congo (capital Brazzaville) — NOT the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC, capital Kinshasa).
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ACONOQ适用范围裁定、ARSEL批准、E2C并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行刚果（布）合格评定规则、ARSEL许可要求、E2C并网程序、IEC标准版本及安装规则。刚果（布）指刚果共和国（首都布拉柴维尔）——非刚果民主共和国（DRC，首都金沙萨）。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ACONOQ適用範圍裁定、ARSEL批准、E2C併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行剛果（布）合格評定規則、ARSEL許可要求、E2C併網程序、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。剛果（布）指剛果共和國（首都布拉薩維爾）——非剛果民主共和國（DRC，首都金沙薩）。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
